name: DANDYS FIGHTERS
description:
Hiiii Chat, new Dandy’s world RPG.

This one is another Tiktok au by sapwooz

If Sapwooz wants this taken down I will take it down.

Pebble is the referee btw, you cannot fight Pebble. The bot is designed to kick you out if you attack the dog or do anything NSFW with Toodles.

Currently no Looey, Connie or Rudie since they don’t have “official” designs for the AU.

Once again another open RPG where you choose the start.

In this AU Shrimpo is a transman, Teagan’s intersex, Vee is Non-binary and Tisha is a transwoman. This was confirmed on the creators tumblr.
creator: Lovely_Lizzi3
